title: Rethinking Clause Management for CDCL SAT Solvers
authors: Yalun Cai, Xindi Zhang, Zhengyuan Shi, Mengxia Tao, Qiang Xu
abstract: Boolean Satisfiability (SAT) solving underpins a wide range of applications in Electronic Design Automation (EDA), particularly formal verification. However, this paper observes that the mainstream clause reduction heuristic in modern SAT solvers becomes ineffective in the critical domain of complex arithmetic circuit verification, such as multipliers. On these instances, the dominant Literal Block Distance (LBD) metric for measuring clause quality degrades into a simple value of clause length, without any perception of dynamic clause usage during solving.To address this issue, a novel clause reduction mechanism is proposed, which is entirely independent of LBD. Its core idea is to decouple and handle separately the two most fundamental characteristics of learnt clauses--inherent lineage and dynamic usage patterns--thereby avoiding the efficiency degradation caused by inappropriately mixing these properties. Experiments show that our method consistently improves mainstream solvers and achieves speedups of up to 5.74x on complex arithmetic circuit problems, while maintaining comparable performance on general-purpose benchmarks. These results challenge the prevailing LBD-centric clause quality metric for clause management.
title_zh: 重新思考CDCL SAT求解器中的子句管理
abstract_zh: 布尔可满足性（SAT）求解在电子设计自动化（EDA）领域，尤其是形式化验证中，具有广泛的应用。然而，本文发现，现代SAT求解器中主流的子句约简启发式方法在复杂算术电路验证（例如乘法器）这一关键领域中效果不佳。在这些实例上，用于衡量子句质量的主流“文字块距离”（Literal Block Distance, LBD）指标退化为仅等同于子句长度的简单数值，无法反映求解过程中子句的动态使用情况。为解决这一问题，本文提出了一种全新的、完全独立于LBD的子句约简机制。其核心思想是将学习子句的两个最基本特征——固有来源（inherent lineage）和动态使用模式——进行解耦并分别处理，从而避免因不当混合这些特性而导致的效率下降。实验表明，该方法持续提升了主流求解器的性能，在复杂算术电路问题上最高实现了5.74倍的加速，同时在通用基准测试中保持了相当的性能表现。这些结果对当前以LBD为中心的子句质量评估体系提出了挑战。

title: Automata Learning with an Incomplete but Inductive Teacher
authors: Daniel Stan, Adrien Pommellet, Juliette Jacquot
abstract: Active automata learning (AAL) under a Minimally Adequate Teacher (MAT) has been successfully used to infer a regular language through membership and equivalence queries. This language might not be fully characterized: we are then interested in finding any solution in a target class of possibly many regular languages. Some problems such as regular language separation or inductive invariant synthesis in the context of regular model checking (RMC) may indeed admit more than one answer. We therefore introduce IdMAT: a new teacher formalism answering queries with respect to any language in the target class, all at once. Such a teacher tailored towards invariant synthesis might provide incomplete "don't know" answers, but also inductive facts of the form "if w1 is accepted, so is w2". We pair IdMAT with a novel AAL algorithm LIndA that 1. encodes all uncertainties as a unique SAT instance and does not fork, 2. leverages incremental SAT solving and UNSAT core analysis, and 3. handles counterexamples of the simple or inductive type in a frugal manner inspired by the Rivest-Schapire refinement technique. We finally evaluate a prototype implementation in the context of regular language separation and RMC.
title_zh: 具有不完备但归纳性教师的自动机学习
abstract_zh: 在具有最小充分教师（Minimally Adequate Teacher, MAT）的框架下，主动自动机学习（Active automata learning, AAL）已成功用于通过成员查询和等价查询来推断正则语言。然而，目标语言可能无法被完全刻画：此时我们关注的是在可能包含多个正则语言的目标类别中寻找任意一个解。例如，正则语言分离问题或在正则模型检测（Regular Model Checking, RMC）背景下的归纳不变式综合问题，确实可能存在多个解。为此，我们提出了IdMAT：一种新的教师形式化模型，它能够同时针对目标类别中的任意语言回答查询。这种专为不变式综合设计的教师可能提供不完整的“未知”回答，也可能提供形如“若字符串w₁被接受，则w₂也被接受”的归纳性事实。我们将IdMAT与一种新颖的AAL算法LIndA相结合，该算法具有以下特点：1）将所有不确定性编码为单一的SAT实例，无需分支；2）利用增量式SAT求解和UNSAT核心分析；3）以受Rivest-Schapire refinement技术启发的节俭方式处理简单型或归纳型反例。最后，我们在正则语言分离和RMC的背景下评估了一个原型实现的效果。

title: Agile V: A Compliance-Ready Framework for AI-Augmented Engineering -- From Concept to Audit-Ready Delivery
authors: Christopher Koch, Joshua Andreas Wellbrock
abstract: Current AI-assisted engineering workflows lack a built-in mechanism to maintain task-level verification and regulatory traceability at machine-speed delivery. Agile V addresses this gap by embedding independent verification and audit artifact generation into each task cycle. The framework merges Agile iteration with V-Model verification into a continuous Infinity Loop, deploying specialized AI agents for requirements, design, build, test, and compliance, governed by mandatory human approval gates. We evaluate three hypotheses: (H1) audit-ready artifacts emerge as a by-product of development, (H2) 100% requirement-level verification is achievable with independent test generation, and (H3) verified increments can be delivered with single-digit human interactions per cycle. A feasibility case study on a Hardware-in-the-Loop system (about 500 LOC, 8 requirements, 54 tests) supports all three hypotheses: audit-ready documentation was generated automatically (H1), 100% requirement-level pass rate was achieved (H2), and only 6 prompts per cycle were required (H3), yielding an estimated 10-50x cost reduction versus a COCOMO II baseline (sensitivity range from pessimistic to optimistic assumptions). We invite independent replication to validate generalizability.
title_zh: 敏捷V：一种合规就绪的AI增强型工程框架——从概念到可审计交付
abstract_zh: 当前的人工智能辅助工程工作流缺乏在机器速度交付的同时维持任务级验证和监管可追溯性的内置机制。Agile V 通过将独立验证和审计产物生成嵌入每个任务周期，解决了这一空白。该框架将敏捷迭代与V模型验证相结合，形成持续的“无限循环”，并部署专门的AI代理分别负责需求、设计、构建、测试和合规环节，各环节由强制性人工审批关卡进行管控。我们评估了三个假设：（H1）开发过程中可自然生成符合审计要求的产物；（H2）通过独立生成测试，可实现100%需求层级的验证；（H3）每个周期仅需极少量人工交互即可交付已验证的增量成果。一项针对硬件在环系统（约500行代码、8项需求、54个测试）的可行性案例研究支持了全部三个假设：自动生成了符合审计要求的文档（H1）；实现了100%需求层级的通过率（H2）；每个周期仅需6次提示（H3），相较于COCOMO II基准模型，预计可节省10至50倍的成本（敏感性分析覆盖从悲观到乐观的假设范围）。我们邀请独立研究者进行复现实验，以验证该方法的普适性。

title: Open-World Verification: A Grand Challenge for Autonomous Systems
authors: KEVIN LEAHY, HAMID ASGARI, LOUISE A. DENNIS, MARTIN S. FEATHER, MICHAEL FISHER, JAVIER IBANEZ-GUZMAN, BRIAN LOGAN, JOANNA I. OLSZEWSKA, SIGNE A. REDFIELD
title_zh: 开放世界验证：自主系统的重大挑战
abstract_zh: None

title: Efficient SoC Power Estimation With Machine Learning
authors: Sujay Pandit, Sujit Dey, Anand Raghunathan
publish: IEEE Transactions on Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) Systems
abstract: We propose machine learning (ML) power, the first ML-based framework that: 1) accelerates end-to-end RTL power estimation by addressing both its key bottlenecks—RTL simulation and power-model evaluation—and 2) extends ML-based power models to system-on-chips (SoCs) with configurable intellectual property (IP) blocks. ML-Power builds models that predict power versus time traces of each SoC block using a very small subset of internal signals called power proxies. The framework is composed of three components: ML-based power proxy activity estimation (PACE), exploiting spatio-temporal correlations for power proxy selection and ML-based power model evaluation (SCOPE), and representative configuration selection using active learning (RECAL). PACE trains a sequence-to-sequence (seq2seq) ML model to translate a transaction-level execution trace into a cycle-level trace of the power proxy signals, allowing much faster simulation models to be used in place of RTL simulation. SCOPE selects power proxies and trains ML-based power models for each block within the SoC. RECAL enables ML-Power to handle SoCs with configurable intellectual property (IP) blocks by using active learning to select a small subset of representative configurations, which are then used to train a unified power model that generalizes across the entire design space. We evaluate ML-Power on an ARM SSE-300 SoC and two RISC-V-based SoCs. Compared to prior state-of-the-art ML-based power estimation frameworks, SCOPE trains power models <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\sim 65\times $</tex-math> </inline-formula> faster, picks 40% fewer proxies, and achieves 2% lower estimation error. For the two RISC-V SoCs with configurable IP blocks, ML-Power achieves less than 10% error in per-cycle power across the entire design space using only 10–14 training configurations. ML-Power also achieves <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\sim 300\times $</tex-math> </inline-formula> inference-time speedup over a commercial RTL power estimation tool with less than 7% error in per-cycle power estimates.
title_zh: 基于机器学习的高效SoC功耗估计
abstract_zh:
我们提出了机器学习（ML）功耗框架（ML-Power），这是首个基于机器学习的框架，具备以下两大优势：1）通过解决端到端RTL功耗估算中的两个关键瓶颈——RTL仿真和功耗模型评估，显著加速估算过程；2）将基于机器学习的功耗模型扩展至包含可配置知识产权（IP）模块的片上系统（SoC）。ML-Power构建的模型能够利用一组极小的内部信号（称为“功耗代理”）来预测每个SoC模块的功耗-时间轨迹。该框架由三个组件构成：基于机器学习的功耗代理活动估计（PACE），利用时空相关性进行功耗代理选择和基于机器学习的功耗模型评估（SCOPE），以及基于主动学习的代表性配置选择（RECAL）。PACE训练一个序列到序列（seq2seq）的机器学习模型，将事务级执行轨迹转换为功耗代理信号的周期级轨迹，从而可用远比RTL仿真更快的仿真模型替代传统RTL仿真。SCOPE负责选择功耗代理，并为SoC中的每个模块训练基于机器学习的功耗模型。RECAL通过主动学习选择少量代表性配置，使ML-Power能够处理具有可配置IP模块的SoC，并基于这些配置训练出一个可在整个设计空间内泛化的统一功耗模型。

我们在ARM SSE-300 SoC和两个基于RISC-V的SoC上对ML-Power进行了评估。与此前最先进的基于机器学习的功耗估算框架相比，SCOPE训练功耗模型的速度快约65倍，选择的代理信号减少40%，且估算误差降低2%。对于两个包含可配置IP模块的RISC-V SoC，ML-Power仅使用10至14个训练配置，即可在整个设计空间内实现低于10%的周期级功耗估算误差。此外，与商用RTL功耗估算工具相比，ML-Power在推理阶段实现了约300倍的速度提升，周期级功耗估算误差低于7%。

title: SVPrompt-MR: An LLM-Based Metamorphic Relation Identification Method with Self-Verification Mechanism
authors: Jun Huang, Meng Li, Xiaohua Yang, Jie Liu, Shiyu Yan
abstract: Metamorphic testing is an effective technique to alleviate the oracle problem in software testing, with metamorphic relations (MRs) as its core. Currently, the identification of MRs relies mainly on domain experts, which leads to low efficiency and considerable subjectivity in MR formulation. Large Language Models (LLMs) show great potential for identifying MRs automatically. In this paper, we propose a self-verificationbased prompt construction strategy for MR identification, which consists of two stages: MR identification and MR verification. Our method is applied to the thermal-hydraulic safety design program for pebble-bed high-temperature gas-cooled reactors, with deepseek-R1 as the underlying model. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach not only covers all 44 MRs identified by experts, but also discovers 24 new MRs. It significantly outperforms existing methods in terms of coverage rate, accuracy rate, and innovation rate, thereby exhibiting superior identification capability. The research results not only advance the study of MR identification, but also provide a valuable reference and inspiration for researchers.
title_zh: SVPrompt-MR：一种基于大语言模型的具有自验证机制的蜕变关系识别方法
abstract_zh: 变异测试是一种有效缓解软件测试中“ oracle 问题”的技术，其核心是变异关系（MRs）。目前，MRs 的识别主要依赖领域专家，导致 MRs 的构建效率低下且具有较大的主观性。大语言模型（LLMs）在自动识别 MRs 方面展现出巨大潜力。本文提出了一种基于自我验证的提示构建策略用于 MRs 识别，该方法包含两个阶段：MRs 识别与 MRs 验证。我们将该方法应用于球床式高温气冷堆热工安全设计程序，并以 deepseek-R1 作为基础模型。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅覆盖了专家识别出的全部 44 个 MRs，还发现了 24 个新的 MRs。在覆盖率、准确率和创新率方面，该方法显著优于现有方法，展现出卓越的识别能力。本研究不仅推动了 MRs 识别领域的研究进展，也为相关研究人员提供了有价值的参考与启发。

title: Design for Testability for VLSI Circuits with A Large Number of Unknown Test Response Sources
authors: Dong Xiang, Wenfei Wang, Can Xiang
publish: 2025 IEEE International Test Conference in Asia (ITC-Asia)
abstract: A new test compression scheme is proposed by using a new DFT architecture, a new gating technique, and a new low-power test application scheme for circuits with a large number of unknown test response sources. A probabilistic measure is proposed to analyze the potential of scan flip-flops to capture unknown responses. All scan flip-flops with enough potential to capture unknown test responses are clustered to localize the effect of the unknown sources on fault coverage. A new test response compactor is presented to avoid unknown test responses and minimize fault coverage loss in the software-defined linear feedback shift-register (SLFSR) based test compression environment. Experimental results are presented to show the effectiveness of the new method.
title_zh: 具有大量未知测试响应源的VLSI电路的可测试性设计
abstract_zh: 提出了一种新的测试压缩方案，该方案采用了一种新的可测性设计（DFT）架构、一种新的门控技术以及一种适用于具有大量未知测试响应源电路的低功耗测试应用方案。提出了一种概率性度量方法，用于分析扫描触发器捕获未知响应的潜力。将所有具有足够潜力捕获未知测试响应的扫描触发器进行聚类，以局部化未知源对故障覆盖率的影响。提出了一种新的测试响应压缩器，可在基于软件定义的线性反馈移位寄存器（SLFSR）的测试压缩环境中避免未知测试响应，并最大限度地减少故障覆盖率的损失。实验结果表明了该新方法的有效性。

title: Efficient Vehicle Data Synchronization Using IBF in VEC Networks: Method and FPGA Hardware Accelerator
authors: Ara Cho, Jinsol Lee, Hyesook Lim
abstract: With the advancement of vehicle-to-everything (V2X) environments and AI technology, vehicle services are continuously evolving. The vehicle-edge-cloud (VEC) network is a suitable structure for autonomous driving and AI-based vehicle services, as it enables real-time interaction between vehicles and the edge and access to cloud resources. To develop vehicle services with more diverse purposes and build high-performance AI models in the VEC network, edge servers collect increasingly large volumes of vehicle data. As the amount of data uploaded from edge servers to the cloud increases, the memory usage in the cloud also increases to accommodate the growing volume of data. Such increases in bandwidth and memory usage hinder the scalability of VEC communication. To address this issue, this paper proposes a vehicle data synchronization method-defined in this work as uploading and storing data-using an invertible Bloom filter (IBF) and its implementation using a difference- IBF (d-IBF) decoding hardware accelerator on FPGA. In the proposed method, for vehicle data with non-varying characteristics, the edge inserts the vehicle data into an IBF and uploads it to the cloud, which updates and stores the data through d- IBF decoding, thereby completing the synchronization process. This allows vehicle data with strong non-varying properties to be synchronized using minimal bandwidth, and memory usage can be reduced by storing only the d-IBF decoding results. This study analyzes real vehicle data to identify non-varying properties and devises an appropriate non-uniform quantization method to use with the proposed approach. Experiments validate the accuracy of the operations of the proposed method, including IBF programming and d-IBF decoding. Furthermore, a hardware accelerator for d-IBF decoding is designed and verified on an FPGA, proving the implementation feasibility of the proposed synchronization method.
title_zh: 基于IBF的VEC网络中高效车辆数据同步方法及FPGA硬件加速器
abstract_zh: 随着车联网（V2X）环境和人工智能（AI）技术的发展，车辆服务正不断演进。车辆-边缘-云（VEC）网络是一种适用于自动驾驶和基于AI的车辆服务的架构，它能够实现车辆与边缘之间的实时交互，并接入云端资源。为了在VEC网络中开发用途更加多样的车辆服务并构建高性能的AI模型，边缘服务器正在收集越来越多的车辆数据。随着从边缘服务器上传至云端的数据量不断增加，云端的内存使用量也随之上升，以容纳不断增长的数据量。这种带宽和内存使用量的增加阻碍了VEC通信的可扩展性。为解决这一问题，本文提出了一种车辆数据同步方法——定义为数据的上传与存储——该方法采用可逆布隆过滤器（IBF），并通过在FPGA上实现基于差分IBF（d-IBF）解码的硬件加速器来实现。在所提出的方法中，对于具有较强非变化特性的车辆数据，边缘端将其插入IBF中并上传至云端，云端则通过d-IBF解码对数据进行更新和存储，从而完成同步过程。该方法使得具有强非变化特性的车辆数据能够以最小的带宽实现同步，同时仅需存储d-IBF解码结果，从而降低内存使用量。本研究分析了真实的车辆数据，识别出其中的非变化特性，并设计了适用于所提方法的非均匀量化方案。实验验证了所提方法在IBF写入和d-IBF解码等操作中的准确性。此外，设计并在FPGA上验证了用于d-IBF解码的硬件加速器，证明了所提同步方法在实际实现上的可行性。

title: Analysis of Encryption Key Zeroization from System-Wide Perspective
authors: Toyofumi Sawa, Kuniyasu Suzaki
publish: 2025 IEEE Annual Computer Security Applications Conference (ACSAC)
abstract: Cryptographic keys are required not to be duplicated unnecessarily and to be zeroized from memory after use, as mandated by ISO/IEC 19790 and FIPS 140–3. Because applications run on an operating system, verifying key zeroization solely through their interactions is difficult. Although methodologies for enforcing key zeroization have been studied, there is a lack of empirical research confirming that zeroization actually occurs in practice. To address this gap, we propose a live memory forensic technique employing an FPGA to periodically detect AES keys, which we then use to investigate the key zeroization behavior of applications that use AES under Ubuntu Linux (with a FIPS-compliant kernel) on both AArch64 and x86-64, as well as on Windows 11 (x86-64). Our investigation reveals that AES instructions hold round keys in registers, but during OS context switches these register contents are copied into memory and remain unzeroized when the process terminates. Moreover, when an application terminates abnormally, insufficient signal handling prevents key zeroization, and cryptographic keys can be included in core dumps potentially leaking them externally. We further observe that, on non-FIPS-compliant kernels, keys can persist across OS reboots. These findings provide valuable information for developers following key zeroization guidelines and for cryptographic module testers. Finally, we propose and supply developers with feasible mitigation strategies to reduce key duplication and persistence at both the application and library levels.
title_zh: 从全局系统角度对加密密钥清零的分析
abstract_zh: 加密密钥必须避免不必要的复制，并在使用后从内存中清零，这是ISO/IEC 19790和FIPS 140-3标准所强制要求的。由于应用程序运行在操作系统之上，仅通过应用程序与系统的交互来验证密钥是否真正清零十分困难。尽管已有研究探讨了强制执行密钥清零的方法，但目前仍缺乏实证研究来确认密钥清零在实际中是否确实发生。为填补这一空白，我们提出一种基于FPGA的实时内存取证技术，可周期性地检测AES密钥，并利用该技术研究在Ubuntu Linux（采用符合FIPS标准的内核）的AArch64和x86-64架构以及Windows 11（x86-64）系统上，使用AES的应用程序的密钥清零行为。我们的研究发现，AES指令会将轮密钥保留在寄存器中，但在操作系统进行上下文切换时，这些寄存器内容会被复制到内存中，并且在进程终止后并未被清零。此外，当应用程序异常终止时，由于信号处理机制不足，导致密钥未能清零，加密密钥可能被包含在核心转储（core dumps）中，从而存在外部泄露的风险。我们还观察到，在不符合FIPS标准的内核上，密钥甚至可能在操作系统重启后仍然残留。这些发现为遵循密钥清零规范的开发者以及密码模块测试人员提供了宝贵的信息。最后，我们提出并为开发者提供了可行的缓解策略，以在应用程序和库层面减少密钥的复制和持久化问题。

title: Modeling and Evaluating Self-Repair in FPGA-Based UAV Embedded Systems
authors: Mohamed Sedik Chebout, Toufik Marir, Farid Mokhati
publish: 2025 Fourth International Conference on Theoretical and Applicative Aspects of Computer Science (ICTAACS)
abstract: Ensuring resilience in Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) requires autonomous mechanisms capable of detecting, diagnosing, and recovering from both hardware and software faults during flight. This paper presents an extended mathematical framework for quantifying self-repair capability in FPGA-based embedded UAV systems. The model integrates four core self-X activities namely self-monitoring, self-diagnosing, self-configuring, and self-optimizing, and introduces additional UAV-specific resilience metrics, including Detection Latency (Ldet), Diagnosis Time (TMD), Reconfiguration Success (SRc), Quality of Recovery (QoR), and Flight Safety (SRsafe). A comprehensive dataset of 30 representative UAV faults, spanning sensor, actuator, communication, software, power, and FPGA layers, is used to evaluate the framework. Eight frequent and critical faults are selected for detailed assessment. A numerical and experimental case study focusing on a barometric sensor drift fault is conducted on a Xilinx Zynq-based UAV. The results show significant improvements in detection latency, diagnostic responsiveness, and reconfiguration time, achieving a self-repair effectiveness of 90% in the evaluated scenario. The proposed approach provides a quantitative foundation for assessing UAV resilience and supports future extensions toward real-time fault injection, cooperative resilience in multi-UAV missions, and AI-based predictive fault management.
title_zh: 基于FPGA的无人机嵌入式系统中自修复的建模与评估
abstract_zh: 确保无人机（UAV）的韧性需要具备在飞行过程中自主检测、诊断并从硬件和软件故障中恢复的机制。本文提出了一种扩展的数学框架，用于量化基于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的嵌入式无人机系统的自修复能力。该模型整合了四项核心“自-X”功能，即自监控、自诊断、自配置和自优化，并引入了若干针对无人机的韧性度量指标，包括检测延迟（Ldet）、诊断时间（TMD）、重构成功率（SRc）、恢复质量（QoR）和飞行安全度（SRsafe）。为评估该框架，研究采用了一个包含30种代表性无人机故障的综合数据集，涵盖传感器、执行器、通信、软件、电源及FPGA等多个层面，并从中选取8种频繁且关键的故障进行详细评估。本文还以基于Xilinx Zynq的无人机平台为对象，针对气压传感器漂移故障开展了数值分析与实验案例研究。结果表明，该方法在检测延迟、诊断响应速度和重构时间方面均有显著改善，在评估场景中实现了90%的自修复有效性。所提出的方法为评估无人机韧性提供了定量基础，并支持未来向实时故障注入、多无人机协同韧性以及基于人工智能的预测性故障管理方向的扩展。

title: IPSO: An Improved Particle Swarm Optimization-Based Method for Test Case Generation
authors: Peng Wang, Shunhui Ji, Yikun Guo, Pengcheng Zhang
abstract: Rapid advancement of DNNs has exposed significant vulnerabilities to NLP software defects, raising critical security concerns. Researchers have proposed various automated testing techniques to generate adversarial test cases. However, existing methods have two limitations: poor quality test cases and inefficiency in time. To address these issues, we propose IPSO, an automated test case generation method integrating word scoring via Locality Sensitive Hashing (LSH) and adaptive probability mutation. The method firstly performs synonym substitution on the influential positions of the test case via word score selection and initializes the high-quality particle swarm. Then, by considering the fitness function of confidence, change rate and semantic perplexity, the test cases are evaluated and constrained comprehensively to improve the quality of the generated test cases. Finally, adaptive probability mutation is adopted to prevent the particle swarm from falling into local optima. Experiments on three datasets and five DNN models show that IPSO consistently has the highest success rate and generates semantically coherent test cases with at least $\mathbf{5 0. 5}$ % less time overhead than heuristic baselines. For example, in the IMDB dataset, IPSO reduces query numbers by 87.7% compared to traditional PSO.
title_zh: IPSO：一种基于改进粒子群优化的测试用例生成方法
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）的快速发展暴露了其在自然语言处理（NLP）软件缺陷面前的显著脆弱性，引发了严重的安全问题。研究人员已提出多种自动化测试技术以生成对抗性测试用例。然而，现有方法存在两个主要局限：生成的测试用例质量较差，以及时间效率低下。为解决这些问题，我们提出了IPSO——一种融合基于局部敏感哈希（LSH）的词语评分与自适应概率变异的自动化测试用例生成方法。该方法首先通过词语评分选择关键位置进行同义词替换，并初始化高质量的粒子群；然后，结合置信度、变化率和语义困惑度的适应度函数，对测试用例进行全面评估与约束，以提升生成测试用例的质量；最后，引入自适应概率变异机制，防止粒子群陷入局部最优。在三个数据集和五个DNN模型上的实验结果表明，IPSO始终具有最高的攻击成功率，且生成的测试用例语义连贯，时间开销至少比启发式基线方法减少$\mathbf{50.5}$%。例如，在IMDB数据集上，IPSO相比传统PSO减少了87.7%的查询次数。

title: Fault-Detecting Randomized Benchmarking for Testing Quantum Processors
authors: Cynthia Kuan, Cheng-Yun Hsieh, Shan-Chi Shih, James Chien-Mo Li
publish: 2025 IEEE International Test Conference in Asia (ITC-Asia)
abstract: Randomized benchmarking (RB) is widely used in the calibration process of quantum computers with the main focus on average gate fidelity. This work proposes a version with the ability of detecting user-specified faults, and successfully detected faults in simulations and real IBM quantum processors. Our proposal can evaluate error per gate (EPG) and detect faults at the same time. We have shown our FDRB successfully detect axial-tilt fault and rotation fault in both simulation and real experiments. The overhead of our proposal is the quantum native gate count increase depending on the number of faults specified by the user.
title_zh: 用于测试量子处理器的故障检测随机基准测试
abstract_zh: 随机基准测试（RB）在量子计算机的校准过程中被广泛使用，主要关注平均门保真度。本文提出了一种能够检测用户指定故障的版本，并在模拟以及真实的IBM量子处理器中成功检测到了故障。我们的方案可以同时评估每门错误率（EPG）并检测故障。我们展示了所提出的FDRB在模拟和真实实验中均成功检测到了轴向倾斜故障和旋转故障。本方案的开销是量子原生门数量的增加，其增加程度取决于用户指定的故障数量。

title: Multi-view Leaderboard: Towards Evaluating the Code Intelligence of LLMs From Multiple Views
authors: Mengyuan Liu, Zexun Zhan, Cuiyun Gao, Yujia Chen, Guoai Xu, Chun Yong Chong, Shan Gao, Xin Xia
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown remarkable performance in code intelligence tasks, prompting the development of various benchmarks and leaderboards to assess their effectiveness across diverse programming scenarios. However, existing leaderboards often rely on coarse-grained metrics and overlook performance variations across different types of tasks. In this paper, we introduce Multi-view Leaderboard, a comprehensive evaluation framework designed to assess the coding capabilities of LLMs from multiple views. Our leaderboard partitions widely-used datasets such as HumanEval, MBPP, and ComplexCodeEval into subsets based on factors like prompt length, problem complexity, and task type. It supports four popular code intelligence tasks including code generation, code completion, test case generation, and API recommendation. Additionally, our leaderboard presents results using ranking tables, line charts, radar charts, and heatmaps. Based on LLMs’ performance on different subsets, we provide model recommendations tailored to different real-world scenarios via a Sankey diagram. A user study involving 11 participants revealed that 90% valued the leaderboard’s practical usefulness for analyzing LLMs’ code intelligence from multiple perspectives. The Multi-view Leaderboard is available at https://huggingface.co/spaces/MVLLL/Multi-view-leaderboard. The demonstration video is available at https://youtu.be/J-zQiOYa1Y8
title_zh: 多视角排行榜：从多个维度评估大语言模型的代码智能能力
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在代码智能任务中表现出色，推动了各类基准测试和排行榜的开发，以评估其在不同编程场景下的有效性。然而，现有的排行榜通常依赖于粗粒度的评估指标，忽视了模型在不同类型任务中的表现差异。本文提出了“多视角排行榜”（Multi-view Leaderboard），这是一个全面的评估框架，旨在从多个维度评估LLMs的代码能力。该排行榜将广泛使用的数据集（如HumanEval、MBPP和ComplexCodeEval）根据提示长度、问题复杂度和任务类型等因素划分为多个子集，支持四种主流的代码智能任务：代码生成、代码补全、测试用例生成和API推荐。此外，我们的排行榜通过排名表、折线图、雷达图和热力图等多种可视化方式展示结果。基于LLMs在不同子集上的表现，我们通过桑基图（Sankey diagram）为不同实际应用场景提供模型选择建议。一项包含11名参与者的用户研究表明，90%的参与者认为该排行榜在多角度分析LLMs代码智能能力方面具有实际应用价值。多视角排行榜可通过 https://huggingface.co/spaces/MVLLL/Multi-view-leaderboard 获取，演示视频见 https://youtu.be/J-zQiOYa1Y8。

title: TeTRIS: General-purpose Fuzzing for Translation Bugs in Source-to-Source Code Transpilers
authors: Yeaseen Arafat, Stefan Nagy
publish: 2025 IEEE Annual Computer Security Applications Conference (ACSAC)
abstract: Amid the rise of heterogeneous computing and concerns over systems and application security, developers are increasingly embracing transpilers: a growing class of tools for converting code from one programming language into another. As languages differ greatly in constructs, syntactic sugar, security mitigations, and more, transpilers face difficulties in faithfully translating software between source and target languages—sometimes causing outright failures, or worse, subtle-yet-incorrect execution behavior. Proactively testing transpilers' correctness is thus critical to the success of code-translation-oriented development tasks, but unfortunately, no effective techniques currently exist. Although fuzz-testing appears a natural fit, current general-purpose fuzzing tools mostly generate invalid, junk code that fails to engage transpilers' core translation logic; while dedicated compiler fuzzers cannot keep pace with the ever-expanding set of languages targeted by existing and emergent transpilers. Thoroughly vetting transpilers' correctness thus demands a fuzzing approach combining the reach of general-purpose fuzzing—with the precision of dedicated compiler fuzzers. This paper presents TeTRIS: a general-purpose fuzzer for testing source-to-source code transpilers. At its core, TeTRIS bridges the flexibility of general-purpose fuzzing, abstracting away language-level differences into a unified interface for fine-grained code mutations, with the precision of compiler fuzzers by rigorously enforcing syntactic and semantic correctness. Relying solely on minimal language specifications, TeTRIS supports fuzzing of any transpiler—irrespective of input or output language—producing high-quality programs that extensively probe its underlying translation logic. In an evaluation against four state-of-the-art fuzzers across seven popular transpilers for C, Go, and Haxe, TeTRIS is the only solution to uphold both high language validity and high transpiler code coverage—whilst supporting the broadest range of transpilers. Moreover, TeTRIS reveals the most code translation bugs—all 12 of which were previously unknown—underscoring its effectiveness in vetting today's diverse transpiler ecosystem.
title_zh: TeTRIS：面向源到源代码转换器中翻译错误的通用模糊测试
abstract_zh:
随着异构计算的兴起以及对系统和应用安全的日益关注，开发者正越来越多地采用转译器（transpilers）——一类将代码从一种编程语言转换为另一种语言的新兴工具。由于不同语言在语法结构、语法糖、安全机制等方面存在显著差异，转译器在源语言与目标语言之间进行准确翻译时面临诸多困难，有时导致直接失败，更糟的是引发细微但错误的执行行为。因此，主动测试转译器的正确性对于以代码翻译为核心的开发任务至关重要。然而遗憾的是，目前尚无有效的测试技术。尽管模糊测试（fuzz-testing）看似是自然的选择，但现有的通用模糊测试工具大多生成无效或垃圾代码，无法有效触发转译器的核心翻译逻辑；而专用的编译器模糊测试工具又难以跟上现有及新兴转译器所支持语言范围的快速扩展。因此，全面验证转译器的正确性亟需一种结合通用模糊测试的广泛覆盖能力与专用编译器模糊测试精确性的新方法。

本文提出了TeTRIS：一种用于测试源到源代码转译器的通用模糊测试框架。TeTRIS的核心在于，它将通用模糊测试的灵活性与编译器模糊测试的精确性相结合——通过抽象语言间的差异，提供统一接口以实现细粒度的代码变异，同时严格保证生成代码的语法和语义正确性。TeTRIS仅依赖于最小化的语言规范，即可支持对任意转译器的模糊测试，无论其输入或输出语言为何，能够生成高质量的程序，深入探测转译器底层的翻译逻辑。

在针对C、Go和Haxe语言的七个主流转译器、对比四种前沿模糊测试工具的评估中，TeTRIS是唯一能够在保持高语言有效性的同时实现高转译器代码覆盖率的方案，并且支持最广泛的转译器类型。此外，TeTRIS发现了最多的代码翻译缺陷，共计12个此前未知的漏洞，充分证明了其在检验当今多样化转译器生态系统中的有效性。

title: OTABase: Enhancing Over-the-Air Testing to Detect Memory Crashes in Cellular Basebands
authors: CheolJun Park, Marc Egli, BeomSeok Oh, Tuan Dinh Hoang, Suhwan Jeong, Martin Crettol, Insu Yun, Mathias Payer, Yongdae Kim
publish: 2025 IEEE Annual Computer Security Applications Conference (ACSAC)
abstract: Baseband processors (BPs) in cellular devices implement complex radio protocols, and memory corruption vulnerabilities in these implementations can lead to critical security breaches, including remote code execution. Traditional approaches to detecting such vulnerabilities rely on reverse engineering or emulation. However, these methods face significant scalability challenges due to proprietary firmware and architectural complexities. Over-the-air (OTA) testing offers broader applicability but poses challenges in managing UE state, detecting crashes, and ensuring protocol coverage. We present OTABase, an OTA testing framework that enables efficient detection of memory crashes in LTE base-bands by leveraging protocol specifications. OTABase combines three key techniques: a network-side state control mechanism for efficient management of UE states and connections, a specification-guided test case generation targeting memory crashes in NAS and RRC protocols, and a two-phase crash detection oracle utilizing protocol-based liveness checks and manufacturer debug features. Evaluating OTABase on six commercial BPs from three major manufacturers, unearthed seven previously unpatched memory crashes. Among these, three were assigned CVEs, including one out-of-bounds write vulnerability that allows remote code execution. Additionally, we extend OTABase to 5G basebands for PoC, demonstrating its generalizability and practical utility.
title_zh: OTABase：增强空中测试以检测蜂窝基带中的内存崩溃问题
abstract_zh: 蜂窝设备中的基带处理器（BP）实现了复杂的无线协议，这些实现中的内存损坏漏洞可能导致严重的安全漏洞，包括远程代码执行。传统检测此类漏洞的方法依赖于逆向工程或仿真技术，但由于固件的专有性以及架构的复杂性，这些方法在可扩展性方面面临重大挑战。空中接口（OTA）测试虽然具有更广泛的适用性，但在管理用户设备（UE）状态、检测崩溃以及确保协议覆盖方面存在困难。本文提出了OTABase，一种基于协议规范的OTA测试框架，能够高效检测LTE基带中的内存崩溃问题。OTABase结合了三种关键技术：一种网络侧的状态控制机制，用于高效管理UE状态和连接；一种基于协议规范引导的测试用例生成方法，专注于NAS和RRC协议中的内存崩溃问题；以及一种两阶段崩溃检测机制，结合基于协议的活性检查和厂商提供的调试功能。在来自三大制造商的六款商用基带处理器上对OTABase进行评估，共发现了七个此前未修复的内存崩溃漏洞，其中三个被分配了CVE编号，包括一个允许远程代码执行的越界写入漏洞。此外，我们还将OTABase扩展至5G基带进行概念验证，展示了其良好的通用性和实际应用价值。

title: LLM-Based Semantic Modeling and Cooperative Evolutionary Fuzzing for Traffic Violation Scenario Generation
authors: Yangyang Liu, Xinyu Li, Yan Xiao, Miao Zhang, Pengcheng Zhang
abstract: Ensuring the safety of autonomous driving systems (ADS) in a cost-effective and efficient manner remains a critical challenge. Existing law-guided scenario generation approaches are typically limited to a narrow subset of legal rules, resulting in insufficient scenario diversity, and search-based methods often struggle with large and sparse search spaces. To address these limitations, we propose SLaFE (Semantic Law Modeling and Fuzzing based on Cooperative Evolution), a novel traffic violation scenario generation framework designed to systematically evaluate the safety of ADS. SLaFE harnesses the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) to convert traffic laws into structured scenario constraints. These scenarios are then optimized via a cooperative evolutionary fuzzing algorithm that explores the parameter space to identify boundary cases likely to trigger abnormal ADS behaviors. We evaluate SLaFE on the Apollo platform within the LGSVL simulator using ten realworld traffic regulations. Experimental results show that SLaFE successfully triggered all 10 types of traffic law violations (10/10), outperforming the best existing method, VioHawk (9/10), while others detected no more than 3. Moreover, SLaFE achieved an average triggering time of 5.1 minutes per law type, significantly faster than VioHawk (9.0 minutes) and other baselines. These results highlight SLaFE’s effectiveness in discovering diverse and critical law-violating scenarios for ADS testing.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的语义建模与协同进化模糊测试在交通违规场景生成中的应用
abstract_zh: 以经济高效且高效的方式确保自动驾驶系统（ADS）的安全性仍然是一个关键挑战。现有的基于法律指导的场景生成方法通常仅限于一小部分交通法规，导致生成的场景多样性不足；而基于搜索的方法则常常在庞大且稀疏的搜索空间中难以有效探索。为解决这些局限性，我们提出了SLaFE（基于协同进化的语义化法律建模与模糊测试），一种新颖的交通违规场景生成框架，旨在系统性地评估ADS的安全性。SLaFE利用大语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，将交通法规转化为结构化的场景约束，并通过一种协同进化的模糊测试算法在参数空间中进行优化，以发现可能触发ADS异常行为的边界情况。我们在LGSVL仿真环境中，基于Apollo平台，使用十条真实交通法规对SLaFE进行了评估。实验结果表明，SLaFE成功触发了全部10种类型的交通违法情形（10/10），优于现有最佳方法VioHawk（9/10），而其他方法最多仅检测到3种。此外，SLaFE平均每类法规的触发时间为5.1分钟，显著快于VioHawk的9.0分钟及其他基线方法。这些结果凸显了SLaFE在发现多样化且关键的违法场景方面，对自动驾驶系统测试具有出色的效能。

title: CAMUS: Context-Aware Neural Mutation Selection
authors: Mingda Chen, Bo Wang, Youfang Lin, Jie M. Zhang
abstract: Mutation analysis is a fundamental technique in software engineering, playing a vital role in software testing and debugging. It introduces small artificial faults (mutants) into a program to simulate realistic defects. These mutants are systematically injected and then leveraged in downstream tasks such as mutation testing, mutation-based fault localization (MBFL), and mutation-based test case prioritization (MBTCP). However, all of these applications require generating and executing a large number of mutants, leading to substantial computational overhead. This scalability issue significantly limits the applicability of mutation analysis to large-scale software systems. To address this challenge, we propose CAMUS, a context-aware neural mutation selection approach. CAMUS models each mutation and its surrounding context as a graph enriched with AST hierarchy and type information. It then employs an encoder with self-attention mechanisms to produce embeddings, from which the selection probability of each mutant is predicted. We evaluate CAMUS on three downstream tasks, i.e., mutation testing, MBFL, and MBTCP, by comparing it with state-of-the-art mutation selection techniques, including the recent large language model DeepSeek-v3. Experiments are conducted on the Defects4J 2.0 and ConDefects benchmarks. Our results show that CAMUS consistently outperforms existing methods across a wide range of mutation retention rates. In mutation testing, CAMUS achieves over 95% accuracy using only 50% of the mutants. In MBTCP, it reaches near-optimal prioritization performance with as little as 5% of the mutants, demonstrating its strong efficiency and effectiveness.
title_zh: CAMUS：上下文感知的神经突变选择
abstract_zh:
变异分析是软件工程中的一项基础技术，在软件测试与调试中发挥着关键作用。该方法通过在程序中引入微小的人工故障（即“变异体”）来模拟真实缺陷。这些变异体被系统地注入后，可用于支持下游任务，如变异测试、基于变异的缺陷定位（MBFL）和基于变异的测试用例优先级排序（MBTCP）。然而，所有这些应用都需要生成并执行大量变异体，导致显著的计算开销。这一可扩展性问题严重限制了变异分析在大规模软件系统中的实际应用。

为应对这一挑战，我们提出了CAMUS——一种上下文感知的神经网络变异选择方法。CAMUS将每个变异及其周围上下文建模为一个图结构，图中融合了抽象语法树（AST）层次结构和类型信息。随后，该方法采用带有自注意力机制的编码器生成嵌入表示，并基于此预测每个变异体被选中的概率。

我们在三个下游任务——变异测试、MBFL和MBTCP上对CAMUS进行了评估，并将其与当前最先进的变异选择技术进行比较，包括近期的大语言模型DeepSeek-v3。实验在Defects4J 2.0和ConDefects基准数据集上进行。结果表明，CAMUS在广泛的变异体保留率下均持续优于现有方法。在变异测试中，CAMUS仅使用50%的变异体即可达到超过95%的准确率；在MBTCP任务中，仅需5%的变异体即可实现接近最优的优先级排序性能，充分展示了其高效性与有效性。

title: Fault Injection and Tolerance Analysis of Battery Management Systems Using SystemC-AMS
authors: Hao-Yang Chi, Chih-Tsun Huang, Jing-Jia Liou, Harry Chen
publish: 2025 IEEE International Test Conference in Asia (ITC-Asia)
abstract: Battery management system (BMS) is a key component to keep battery packs operating in safe and enduring conditions. This paper presents a SystemC-AMS–based BMS simulation platform including both BMS control and cell modeling designed to support fault injection and modular protection analysis. Through single-bit fault injection experiments, only a small fraction (12.8%) of injected faults violate the safety conditions. And SOC estimation and ADC modules are identified as the most critical components with faults covering all severe conditions such as overcharge, overdischarge and overheating. After applying dual module redundancy (DMR), we can enhance the reliability and reduce safety violations from the original 92321 errors to 72020 and 7860 errors or 78.01% and 8.51%, respectively for ADC and SOC modules. With DMR protection for both the ADC and SOC modules, we can eliminate all safety violations.
title_zh: 基于SystemC-AMS的电池管理系统故障注入与容错性分析
abstract_zh: 电池管理系统（BMS）是确保电池组在安全且持久条件下运行的关键组件。本文提出了一种基于SystemC-AMS的BMS仿真平台，该平台集成了BMS控制与电池单体建模，旨在支持故障注入和模块化保护分析。通过单比特故障注入实验发现，仅有小部分（12.8%）注入的故障会违反安全条件。其中，SOC估计和ADC模块被识别为最关键的组件，其故障涵盖了过充、过放和过热等所有严重情况。在应用双模块冗余（DMR）后，系统可靠性得以提升，ADC和SOC模块的安全违规次数分别从原始的92321次减少至72020次和7860次，降幅分别为78.01%和8.51%。当对ADC和SOC模块同时采用DMR保护时，可完全消除所有安全违规现象。

title: VMIGEN: Utilizing Virtual Machine Introspection for Fuzzing Complex Closed-Source Targets
authors: Florian Schweins, Moritz Schloegel, Moritz Bley, Nico Schiller, Thorsten Holz
publish: 2025 IEEE Annual Computer Security Applications Conference (ACSAC)
abstract: Modern fuzzing is a highly successful testing method, but it still struggles with stateful software that expects complex, context-rich inputs. Instead of further tuning the fuzzing process itself, we introduce VMIGEN, a new approach that captures interactions by implicitly recording both complex inputs and the corresponding system states needed for effective testing. By using Virtual Machine Introspection (VMI), a technique for observing the state and behavior of a VM from the outside, we can monitor actual runtime events for a given system. This way, we can extract concrete inputs and snapshot the whole system at relevant interactions to preserve the full system state, thereby enabling effective fuzzing. At the same time, our approach does not require access to source code, allowing us to test closed-source software on Windows. To demonstrate VMIGEN's effectiveness, we use it to test kernel drivers, including those of anti-virus engines, and Remote Procedure Call (RPC) interfaces. Our comprehensive evaluation shows that our VMI-based method enables an existing fuzzer to achieve up to 6.6x more code coverage. In total, VMIGEN allowed us to discover 33 previously unknown bugs, which we disclosed in a coordinated way to the affected vendors.
title_zh: VMIGEN：利用虚拟机自省技术对复杂闭源目标进行模糊测试
abstract_zh: 现代模糊测试（fuzzing）是一种非常成功的测试方法，但在处理需要复杂、上下文丰富的输入的状态化软件时仍面临挑战。我们并未进一步调整模糊测试过程本身，而是提出了一种新方法 VMIGEN，该方法通过隐式记录复杂输入以及相应的系统状态来捕捉交互行为，从而实现高效测试。通过使用虚拟机自省（Virtual Machine Introspection, VMI）技术——即从外部观察虚拟机状态和行为的技术——我们可以监控给定系统的实际运行时事件。借此，我们能够提取具体的输入，并在关键交互点对整个系统进行快照，以完整保存系统状态，从而支持有效的模糊测试。同时，我们的方法无需访问源代码，因此可用于测试 Windows 上的闭源软件。为验证 VMIGEN 的有效性，我们将其应用于内核驱动程序（包括杀毒软件引擎的驱动）以及远程过程调用（RPC）接口的测试。全面评估结果表明，基于 VMI 的方法可使现有模糊测试工具的代码覆盖率最高提升 6.6 倍。总计，VMIGEN 帮助我们发现了 33 个此前未知的漏洞，均已通过协调方式向相关厂商披露。

title: Trace: Test Repair via Agent-based Context Extraction with LLMs
authors: Jingxiang Tu, Bo Lin, Yihao Qin, Shangwen Wang, Liqian Chen, Xiaoguang Mao
abstract: As software evolves, test code must be co-maintained to ensure quality, but it often becomes obsolete, leading to failures that mislead developers and increase maintenance overhead. While recent Large Language Model (LLM)-based approaches show promise for repairing obsolete tests, their effectiveness is constrained by a critical challenge: providing comprehensive, repository-level context without overwhelming the models’ input limits. Fixed retrieval strategies often fail to capture the diverse dependencies required for complex repairs. In this paper, we present Trace, a retrieve-agent-based repository-level test repair method. The Trace selectively retrieves crucial context by analyzing (1) class-level structures to understand internal changes, (2) caller methods to capture real-world usage patterns, and (3) related files along the call graph to trace transitive dependencies. This multi-faceted context provides the LLM with a precise and concise understanding of the necessary code environment. We evaluated Trace on a dataset of real-world Java test updates, where it demonstrated superior performance compared to existing state-of-the-art baselines. Our results confirm that a structured, adaptive retrieval process is key to unlocking the full potential of LLMs for automated test maintenance.
title_zh: 追踪：基于代理的上下文提取与大语言模型的测试修复
abstract_zh: 随着软件的演进，测试代码必须同步维护以确保质量，但测试代码常常变得过时，导致测试失败，误导开发人员并增加维护开销。尽管近期基于大语言模型（LLM）的方法在修复过时测试方面展现出潜力，但其有效性受到一个关键挑战的限制：在不超出模型输入长度限制的前提下，难以提供全面的仓库级上下文。固定的检索策略往往无法捕捉复杂修复所需的多样化依赖关系。本文提出 Trace，一种基于检索代理的仓库级测试修复方法。Trace 通过分析（1）类级结构以理解内部变更，（2）调用方法以捕捉真实使用模式，以及（3）沿调用图的相关文件以追踪传递性依赖，从而选择性地检索关键上下文。这种多维度的上下文为大语言模型提供了精确而简洁的代码环境理解。我们在一个真实 Java 测试更新数据集上评估了 Trace，结果表明其性能优于现有的最先进基线方法。实验结果证实，结构化且自适应的检索过程是充分发挥大语言模型在自动化测试维护中潜力的关键。
